title: Low-Complexity LFSR Synchronization by Forward-Only Message Passing
abstract: Gershenfeld and Grinstein showed that a modulated linear-feedback shiftregister (LFSR) sequence can be synchronized by feeding the modulated sequence into an analog version of the LFSR. In this paper, a similar algorithm for synchronizing a LFSR sequence disturbed by additive white Gaussian noise is derived as forward-only message passing through the corresponding factor graph.
